mapper.sql: A.MTG_ID AS mtgId, A.MTG_NM AS mtgNm, A.MTG_MTR_CN AS mtgMtrCn, A.MTG_SN AS mtgSn, A.MTG_CO AS mtgCo, A.MTG_DE AS mtgDe, A.MTG_PLACE AS mtgPlace, A.MTG_BEGIN_TM AS mtgBeginTime, A.MTG_END_TM AS mtgEndTime, A.MTG_RESULT_CN AS mtgResultCn, A.ATDRN_CO AS atdrnCo, A.NONATDRN_CO AS nonatdrnCo, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId, TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM TB_MTG_INFO A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.MTG_DE DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_MTG_INFO A WHERE 1=1
SELECT FROM TB_MTG_INFO A WHERE A.MTG_ID = #{mtgId}

SELECT ORGNZT_ID, ORGNZT_NM, ORGNZT_DC FROM TB_ORGNZT_INFO
WHERE ORGNZT_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
ORDER BY ORGNZT_NM

SELECT EMPLYR_ID, USER_NM, OFFM_TELNO, DETAIL_ADRES, ESNTL_ID FROM TB_EMPLYR_INFO WHERE EMPLYR_STTUS_CODE = 'P'
AND USER_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
ORDER BY USER_NM
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_MTG_INFO (MTG_ID, MTG_NM, MTG_MTR_CN, MTG_SN, MTG_CO, MTG_DE, MTG_PLACE, MTG_BEGIN_TM, MTG_END_TM, ATDRN_CO, NONATDRN_CO, FRST_REGISTER_ID, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM) VALUES (#{mtgId}, #{mtgNm}, #{mtgMtrCn}, #{mtgSn}, #{mtgCo}, #{mtgDe}, #{mtgPlace}, #{mtgBeginTime}, #{mtgEndTime}, #{atdrnCo}, #{nonatdrnCo}, #{frstRegisterId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_MTG_INFO SET MTG_NM = #{mtgNm}, MTG_MTR_CN = #{mtgMtrCn}, MTG_DE = #{mtgDe}, MTG_PLACE = #{mtgPlace}, MTG_BEGIN_TM = #{mtgBeginTime}, MTG_END_TM = #{mtgEndTime}, MTG_RESULT_CN = #{mtgResultCn}, LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{lastUpdusrId}, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE MTG_ID = #{mtgId}
